overall.description: Game engine footage from a maritime simulator showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through choppy waters. The vessel moves steadily forward under overcast skies while navigation monitors display radar and chart data.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open coastal waters

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar display and navigation charts while maintaining course through moderate seas

entered.detail: red-painted metal deck of the vessel's bow with safety railings and anchor equipment
metal safety railing along the port side of the bow deck
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the bow deck
three-screen navigation display showing chart plotter, rotating radar, and vessel data readouts
choppy grey sea with visible wave patterns extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a steady forward-facing view from a ship's bridge, looking out over the bow as the vessel cuts through choppy waters. Three navigation monitors at the top of the frame display chart data, a sweeping radar, and ship telemetry. The overcast sky and dim lighting create a moody maritime atmosphere while the ship maintains steady forward motion with no other vessels or obstacles visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady forward-facing perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a moody, overcast maritime environment. It begins with a view over the bow, where the vessel cuts through choppy waters under a dim, gray sky. As the ship maintains its constant forward motion, the focus remains on the horizon, framed by three navigation monitors at the top of the screen displaying sweeping radar, chart data, and telemetry. The scene continues in this solitary state, gliding through the open sea with no other vessels or obstacles in sight.
